_comment: Example of a complete Gemini response — use this to build the UI against

camps.label: Pro-Security
camps.position: Want 24/7 security guards in the building
representative_quotes: My apartment was broken into last month. We NEED security.
I've had 3 packages stolen this year alone.

camps.label: Cost-Conscious
representative_quotes: We already pay 300/month. Adding a guard would double it.
Cameras work fine. A guard is just theater.

compromise.summary: Night-shift security guard (10pm-6am) with cost split proportional to apartment size.
compromise.details: Hire one security guard for night shift only (10pm-6am), when most safety incidents occur. Cost distributed proportionally by apartment square meters — larger units pay more, studios pay less. Upgrade camera system for daytime coverage. Trial period of 3 months with resident vote to continue.

addresses.how_addressed: Night coverage addresses the primary safety window. Package theft is mitigated by upgraded cameras during day.
Night-only halves the cost vs 24/7. Proportional split means smaller apartments pay less. 3-month trial means it's reversible.
